tagline_ar: توثيق ومساءلة — لا انتقام ولا عقاب جماعي
tagline_en: Documentation and lawful accountability — not revenge, not collective punishment
mission_ar: «لست شجرة» منصّة مدنية للتوثيق والمساءلة، تحفظ السجلّ الموثّق للجرائم التي ارتُكبت في سوريا. نجمع ونتحقّق وننشر الأدلّة المتاحة علنًا حول أفرادٍ وجهاتٍ محدّدين تتوفّر أدلّة موثوقة على تورّطهم — لا حول طوائف أو مكوّنات أو جماعات. غايتنا حفظ الذاكرة، ودعم الضحايا، ودعم المساءلة عبر القنوات القانونية وحقوق الإنسان المشروعة. نطلب العدالة لا الانتقام.
mission_en: HLShajara is a civic documentation and accountability platform that preserves the documented record of crimes committed in Syria. We collect, verify, and publish publicly available evidence about specific individuals and entities credibly implicated — never communities, sects, or groups. Our purpose is memory, victim support, and lawful accountability through legitimate legal and human-rights channels. We seek justice, not revenge.
core_value: Every published claim concerns a named individual or entity and is backed by a credible public source. No source, no publication. No group, no identity-based targeting.
what_it_is: A source-backed public archive of individuals and entities credibly implicated in crimes in Syria.
A referral pathway that feeds lawful justice mechanisms: courts, UN bodies (CoI/IIIM), and sanctions advocacy.
A space for memory and victim support.
what_it_is_not: Not a boycott or social-pressure campaign.
Not a tool to mobilize the public against anyone.
Not an accuser of communities, sects, families, regions, or tribes.
Not a venue for harassment, threats, doxxing, or revenge.
legal_gate: No living individual is named publicly until a qualified lawyer in the operating jurisdiction has reviewed the publication standard and the first entries.
